---
title: "法政大学"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

```{r setup}
source("../common_site.R", local = TRUE)

TEAM <- "法政"

team_info <- team_meta |>
  filter(team == TEAM) |>
  slice_head(n = 1)

team_current <- current_team_table |>
  filter(team == TEAM) |>
  slice_head(n = 1)

team_games <- team_game_log |>
  filter(team == TEAM) |>
  arrange(gamedate) |>
  mutate(
    game_number = row_number(),
    year_key = as.character(year(gamedate))
  )

team_scope <- team_games |>
  filter(game_number >= 31)

team_average_table <- team_game_log |>
  arrange(team, gamedate) |>
  group_by(team) |>
  mutate(game_number = row_number()) |>
  filter(game_number >= 31) |>
  summarise(avg_rate = mean(rating_after), .groups = "drop") |>
  arrange(desc(avg_rate), team) |>
  mutate(avg_rank = row_number())

scope_average <- if (nrow(team_scope) > 0) round(mean(team_scope$rating_after), 1) else NA_real_

peak_game <- team_scope |>
  arrange(desc(rating_after), desc(gamedate)) |>
  slice_head(n = 1)

low_game <- team_scope |>
  arrange(rating_after, desc(gamedate)) |>
  slice_head(n = 1)

avg_rank_row <- team_average_table |>
  filter(team == TEAM) |>
  slice_head(n = 1)

scope_span_label <- if (nrow(team_scope) > 0) {
  paste0(fmt_date(min(team_scope$gamedate)), "-", fmt_date(max(team_scope$gamedate)))
} else {
  "NO DATA"
}

record_card <- function(label, value, note) {
  div(
    class = "metric-card",
    div(class = "metric-label", label),
    div(class = "metric-value", value),
    div(class = "metric-note", note)
  )
}

peak_note <- if (nrow(peak_game) > 0) {
  paste0("Rank ", peak_game$rank_after[[1]], " / ", fmt_date(peak_game$gamedate[[1]]))
} else {
  "NO DATA"
}

low_note <- if (nrow(low_game) > 0) {
  paste0("Rank ", low_game$rank_after[[1]], " / ", fmt_date(low_game$gamedate[[1]]))
} else {
  "NO DATA"
}

avg_note <- if (nrow(avg_rank_row) > 0) {
  paste0("Rank ", avg_rank_row$avg_rank[[1]], " / ", scope_span_label)
} else {
  "NO DATA"
}

current_note <- if (nrow(team_current) > 0) {
  paste0("Rank ", team_current$rank[[1]], " / ", fmt_date(latest_snapshot_date))
} else {
  "NO DATA"
}

team_year_options <- sort(unique(team_games$year_key), decreasing = TRUE)
default_year_key <- if (as.character(current_year) %in% team_year_options) {
  as.character(current_year)
} else if (length(team_year_options) > 0) {
  team_year_options[[1]]
} else {
  "ALL"
}

team_plot_rows <- team_games |>
  transmute(
    year_key,
    date = format(gamedate, "%Y-%m-%d"),
    rating_after = round(rating_after, 1),
    hover_text = paste0(
      fmt_date(gamedate),
      "<br>",
      hover_result,
      "<br>Rating ",
      sprintf("%.1f", rating_after),
      "<br>Rank ",
      rank_after
    )
  )

team_game_rows <- team_games |>
  arrange(desc(gamedate), desc(gametype)) |>
  transmute(
    year_key,
    date_label = fmt_date(gamedate),
    gametype,
    team_name,
    team_url = team_url(team),
    team_color,
    score_for,
    score_against,
    opponent_name,
    opponent_url = team_url(opponent),
    opponent_color,
    rating_move_label = sprintf("%+.1f", rating_delta)
  )

team_widget_payload <- list(
  points = team_plot_rows,
  games = team_game_rows,
  defaultYear = default_year_key
)

team_plot_widget <- plot_ly() |>
  layout(
    paper_bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
    plot_bgcolor = "rgba(255,255,255,0.96)",
    margin = list(l = 48, r = 20, t = 20, b = 44),
    xaxis = list(title = "", tickformat = "%Y/%m"),
    yaxis = list(title = "RATING"),
    showlegend = FALSE
  ) |>
  config(displayModeBar = FALSE, responsive = TRUE) |>
  htmlwidgets::onRender(
    "function(el, x, data) {
      const selector = document.getElementById('team-view-year');
      const tableTarget = document.getElementById('recent-games-table');
      const countTarget = document.getElementById('recent-games-count');
      const points = data.points || [];
      const games = data.games || [];
      const defaultYear = data.defaultYear || 'ALL';

      function esc(v) {
        return String(v ?? '').replace(/[&<>\\\"']/g, function(ch) {
          return ({'&':'&amp;','<':'&lt;','>':'&gt;','\\\"':'&quot;',\"'\":'&#39;'})[ch];
        });
      }

      function parseDate(value) {
        return new Date(value + 'T00:00:00');
      }

      function activeYear() {
        return selector ? selector.value : defaultYear;
      }

      function filterPoints() {
        const yearKey = activeYear();
        return points.filter(function(row) {
          return yearKey === 'ALL' || row.year_key === yearKey;
        });
      }

      function filterGames() {
        const yearKey = activeYear();
        return games.filter(function(row) {
          return yearKey === 'ALL' || row.year_key === yearKey;
        });
      }

      function buildRangeBreaks(rows) {
        if (rows.length < 2) {
          return [];
        }

        const skipped = [];

        for (let i = 1; i < rows.length; i += 1) {
          const prev = parseDate(rows[i - 1].date);
          const next = parseDate(rows[i].date);
          const diff = Math.round((next - prev) / 86400000);

          if (diff <= 10) {
            continue;
          }

          const cursor = new Date(prev.getTime());
          cursor.setDate(cursor.getDate() + 1);

          while (cursor < next) {
            skipped.push(cursor.toISOString().slice(0, 10));
            cursor.setDate(cursor.getDate() + 1);
          }
        }

        return skipped.length ? [{ values: skipped }] : [];
      }

      function renderPlot() {
        const rows = filterPoints();

        if (!rows.length) {
          Plotly.react(el, [], {
            paper_bgcolor: 'rgba(0,0,0,0)',
            plot_bgcolor: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.96)',
            margin: { l: 48, r: 20, t: 20, b: 44 },
            xaxis: { visible: false },
            yaxis: { visible: false },
            annotations: [{
              text: 'NO DATA',
              showarrow: false,
              font: { size: 16, color: '#5f6c77' }
            }]
          }, { displayModeBar: false, responsive: true });
          return;
        }

        Plotly.react(el, [{
          x: rows.map(function(row) { return row.date; }),
          y: rows.map(function(row) { return row.rating_after; }),
          text: rows.map(function(row) { return row.hover_text; }),
          hoverinfo: 'text',
          type: 'scatter',
          mode: 'lines+markers',
          line: { color: '#17324A', width: 3 },
          marker: { size: 6, color: '#17324A' }
        }], {
          paper_bgcolor: 'rgba(0,0,0,0)',
          plot_bgcolor: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.96)',
          margin: { l: 48, r: 20, t: 20, b: 44 },
          xaxis: {
            title: '',
            tickformat: '%Y/%m',
            rangebreaks: buildRangeBreaks(rows)
          },
          yaxis: { title: 'RATING' },
          showlegend: false
        }, { displayModeBar: false, responsive: true });
      }

      function renderGames() {
        if (!tableTarget || !countTarget) {
          return;
        }

        const rows = filterGames();
        countTarget.textContent = rows.length + ' games';

        if (!rows.length) {
          tableTarget.innerHTML = '<div class=\"empty-state\">NO GAMES</div>';
          return;
        }

        const body = rows.map(function(row) {
          return '<tr>' +
            '<td>' + esc(row.date_label) + '</td>' +
            '<td>' + esc(row.gametype) + '</td>' +
            '<td class=\"matchup-col\"><a href=\"' + esc(row.team_url) + '\" style=\"color:' + esc(row.team_color) + '\" class=\"team-link-inline\">' + esc(row.team_name) + '</a><span class=\"score-inline\">' + esc(row.score_for) + ' - ' + esc(row.score_against) + '</span><a href=\"' + esc(row.opponent_url) + '\" style=\"color:' + esc(row.opponent_color) + '\" class=\"team-link-inline\">' + esc(row.opponent_name) + '</a></td>' +
            '<td>' + esc(row.rating_move_label) + '</td>' +
          '</tr>';
        }).join('');

        tableTarget.innerHTML = '<div class=\"table-shell compact-table-shell\"><table class=\"compact-data-table\"><thead><tr><th>DATE</th><th>TYPE</th><th>MATCHUP</th><th>RATING MOVE</th></tr></thead><tbody>' + body + '</tbody></table></div>';
      }

      function renderAll() {
        renderPlot();
        renderGames();
      }

      if (selector) {
        selector.addEventListener('change', renderAll);
        selector.value = defaultYear;
      }

      renderAll();
    }",
    data = team_widget_payload
  )
```

::: {.minimal-hero}
<div class="minimal-kicker">UNIVERSITY</div>
<h1 class="minimal-title">`r team_info$TeamName[[1]]`</h1>
<div class="hero-meta-strip">
  <span>RANK `r team_current$rank[[1]]`</span>
  <span>RATE `r sprintf("%.1f", team_current$display_rating[[1]])`</span>
  <span>LEAGUE `r team_info$LeagueName[[1]]`</span>
  <span>LAST `r fmt_date(team_current$last_gamedate[[1]])`</span>
</div>
:::

<div class="section-actions">
  <a href="../explore.html#university-browser" class="directory-link">大学一覧へ戻る</a>
</div>

## RECORDS

```{r record-cards}
div(
  class = "metric-grid",
  record_card(
    "CURRENT RATE",
    sprintf("%.1f", team_current$display_rating[[1]]),
    current_note
  ),
  record_card(
    "HIGHEST RATE",
    if (nrow(peak_game) > 0) sprintf("%.1f", peak_game$rating_after[[1]]) else "N/A",
    peak_note
  ),
  record_card(
    "LOWEST RATE",
    if (nrow(low_game) > 0) sprintf("%.1f", low_game$rating_after[[1]]) else "N/A",
    low_note
  ),
  record_card(
    "AVERAGE RATE",
    if (!is.na(scope_average)) sprintf("%.1f", scope_average) else "N/A",
    avg_note
  )
)
```

## RATING TREND

```{r team-year-selector}
div(
  class = "browser-controls",
  div(
    class = "control-block",
    tags$label(`for` = "team-view-year", class = "control-label", "VIEW"),
    tags$select(
      id = "team-view-year",
      class = "control-input",
      tags$option(value = "ALL", "ALL"),
      lapply(team_year_options, function(year_value) {
        tags$option(
          value = year_value,
          selected = if (year_value == default_year_key) "selected" else NULL,
          year_value
        )
      })
    )
  )
)
```

```{r team-plot}
team_plot_widget
```

## RECENT GAMES

```{r recent-games-shell}
div(
  class = "game-panel",
  div(
    class = "game-panel-head",
    tags$div(id = "recent-games-count", class = "table-count")
  ),
  tags$div(id = "recent-games-table")
)
```
